Veterans Benefits: New York offers multiple veterans property-tax exemptions, veterans tuition awards and education benefits, civil service preference, and state military/veterans pay tax treatment that can exempt military retirement and active-duty pay from New York income tax.
LGBTQSource: HRC MEI 2025 + MAP state policy score
Description: Upstate New York city anchored by Syracuse University, SUNY Upstate Medical University, a local VA medical center, Hancock Field Air National Guard Base, and the growing Central New York semiconductor corridor tied to Micron. Syracuse offers comparatively affordable housing, strong healthcare access, arts and college-town amenities, nearby lakes and trails, but heavy lake-effect snow and elevated violent-crime rates.
